---
title: "In Class Exercise 2: IS415-GAA"
author: "Jenna Cheo"
date: "August 26, 2024"
date-modified: "last-modified"
format: html
editor: visual
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  freeze: true
---

## Getting started

The code chunk below will be used to install and load these packages in RStudio.

```{r}
pacman::p_load(sf, tidyverse)
```

### Data Sets

One data set will be used in this in class exercise.

-   GEOSPATIAL: Master Plan 2014 Subzone Boundary (Web) (i.e. `MP14_SUBZONE_WEB_PL`) in SHP and KML format \[ [data.gov.sg](https://data.gov.sg/) \]

```{r}
mpsz = st_read(dsn = "data/MasterPlan2014SubzoneBoundaryWebSHP", 
                  layer = "MP14_SUBZONE_WEB_PL")
```
